html:
Butter is a rare Dairy Food item that has a 2% chance of being dropped by a Butterfly.


Tips

  • As Butter only comes from Butterflies, it's highly recommended not to pick flowers near one's base, as more flowers equates to more chances for Butter.

Trivia

  • The fact that it comes from Butterflies, as stated by Maxwell, is a pun on the word "Butterfly".
    • Butter's striped appearance, and the fact that it comes from butterflies may also be a reference to the browser-based MMO Glitch, that ran from 2009 to 2012.
  • Butter used to give 80 research points when used on a Science Machine in the early beta of Don't Starve.
  • Wilson's quote "I can't believe it's butter!" is a reference to the margarine brand "I Can't Believe It's Not Butter!"

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

Butter is a rare Dairy Food item that has a 2% chance of being dropped by a Butterfly.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Butter can be used in Crock Pot recipes that require any Dairy, such as Ice Cream. In addition, the following recipes specifically require Butter.
×2
×2
Tips[edit | edit source]
As Butter only comes from Butterflies, it's highly recommended not to pick flowers near one's base, as more flowers equates to more chances for Butter.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The fact that it comes from Butterflies, as stated by Maxwell, is a pun on the word "Butterfly".
Butter's striped appearance, and the fact that it comes from butterflies may also be a reference to the browser-based MMO Glitch, that ran from 2009 to 2012.
Butter used to give 80 research points when used on a Science Machine in the early beta of Don't Starve.
Wilson's quote "I can't believe it's butter!" is a reference to the margarine brand "I Can't Believe It's Not Butter!"
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

'''Butter''' is a rare [[Dairy product|Dairy]] [[Food]] [[item]] that has a 2% chance of being dropped by a [[Butterfly]]. 

__NOTOC__

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
Butter can be used in [[Crock Pot]] recipes that require any [[Dairy]], such as [[Ice Cream]]. In addition, the following recipes specifically require Butter.

{{Recipe
|item1  = Butter
|item2  = Eggs
|item3  = Berry
|item4  = Filler
|pot    = yes
|result = Waffles
}}{{Recipe
|item1 = Butter
|count1 = 1
|item2 = Fruit
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Honey
|count3 = 1
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Fresh Fruit Crepes
|character=Warly
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Butter
|count1 = 1
|item2 = Wobster
|count2 = 1
|item3 = Filler
|count3 = 2
|pot = yes
|result = Wobster Dinner
|dlc=Shipwrecked
}}
=={{pic32|Prototype}} Tips== 

*As Butter only comes from Butterflies, it's highly recommended not to pick flowers near one's base, as more flowers equates to more chances for Butter.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== 
*The fact that it comes from Butterflies, as stated by [[Maxwell]], is a pun on the word "Butterfly".
**Butter's striped appearance, and the fact that it comes from butterflies may also be a reference to the browser-based MMO ''[[Wikipedia:Glitch (video game)|Glitch]]'', that ran from 2009 to 2012.
*Butter used to give 80 [[Research points list|research points]] when used on a [[Science Machine]] in the early beta of ''Don't Starve''.
*Wilson's quote "I can't believe it's butter!" is a reference to the margarine brand "I Can't Believe It's Not Butter!"
